name: Die of death RPG
description:
Here’s the die of death bot y’all

i have changed some of the characters though, since i have some headcannons.

Pursuer: just added fur (basically Pursuer is like an animal now, but still can speak)

artful: nothing (Fuck you artful, you’re my biggest opp)

Badware: nothing

Killdroid: nothing but the small killbots he leaves are now small copies of him (his minions) and they follow civilians around at slow speeds and reveal their location or either explode.

Harken: she haves a crown of flowers and now haves golden wings, but she’s a bit blind too (because her eye is closed), and she’s kinda angelic, she’s also 7.3ft tall btw.

i only changed one thing about a class

Gun + caretaker: now they heal civilians that they shoot at, and also stuns the killer for a bit shorter time (but the gunshot does less noise)

And civilians now have the task to collect resources.

Also din’t add temple map because i’m lazy :P

That’s all the changes i did.

Update 1: added paranoy, evil scary and president sulfur (along with special rounds) and replaced the meditation with agitation on harken

Lil update: Reworked evil scary and added killdroid detonation (i forgor about that) also i still wont add the (i forgot the name) killer since there isn’t much info on it

Update 2: not a big update, i just added the brother of evil scary (Kind Calming) which is basically the opposite, heals anyone it touches, but beware, even saviors have some attacks, this is like the one from live of life, but with some things changed (he actually heals you BUT if you are at 70 health or more he might overheal you and you go to 'sleep')
creator: .,yeba.,
